waves.point_eqs_str: a['flen']=a['reg00']; a['n']=Math.floor((a['sample']*a['flen'])); a['vol']=((a['value1']+a['value2'])*(1+div(0.1,(a['sample']+0.03)))); a['chg']=Math.min(Math.max((a['vol']-a['gmegabuf'][Math.floor(a['n'])]), -1), 1); a['dec']=((Math.abs(((a['chg']>0)?1:0))>0.00001)?((1-(a['chg']*0.3))):((1+(a['chg']*0.2)))); a['chg']=(a['q1']-a['q2']); a['dec']=(0.94-(Math.abs(a['chg'])*((Math.abs(((a['chg']>0)?1:0))>0.00001)?(0.2):(0.1)))); a['dec']=Math.min(Math.max(a['dec'], 0), 1); a['gmegabuf'][Math.floor(a['n'])]=((a['gmegabuf'][Math.floor(a['n'])]*a['dec'])+(a['vol']*(1-a['dec']))); a['dec']=div(a['q2'],4); a['dec']=Math.max(Math.min(a['dec'], 1), 0.1); a['gmegabuf'][Math.floor(a['n'])]=((a['gmegabuf'][Math.floor(a['n'])]*a['dec'])+(a['gmegabuf'][Math.floor((a['n']+((a['q2']<0.8)?1:0)))]*(1-a['dec']))); a['gmegabuf'][Math.floor((a['n']+10000))]=((a['gmegabuf'][Math.floor((a['n']+10000))]*0.2)+div((0.8*a['vol']),3)); a['a']=0.0; a['x']=a['sample']; a['y']=(0.2+(a['gmegabuf'][Math.floor((a['n']+0))]*0.23));

frame_eqs_str: a['decay']=1; a['vol']=(((a['bass']+a['mid'])+a['treb'])*0.55); a['vol']=a['vol']; a['mv_r']=(0.5+(0.4*Math.sin((a['time']*1.324)))); a['mv_g']=(0.5+(0.4*Math.cos((a['time']*1.371)))); a['zoom']=1; a['musictime']=(a['musictime']+a['vol']); a['dx']=(Math.sin((a['musictime']*0.1))*0.07); a['dy']=(Math.cos((a['musictime']*0.069))*0.07); a['q8']=a['musictime']; a['q4']=(Math.sin(((a['musictime']*0.03)*0.5))*0.1); a['q5']=(Math.cos(((a['musictime']*0.03)*2))*0.1); a['monitor']=a['rot'];
